name: success_empty_events
code:
proof fn phi_1_success_empty_events(cpackets: Seq<CPacket>, net_events: Seq<NetEvent>, my_ep: AbstractEndPoint)
    requires
        cpackets.len() > 0,
        outbound_packet_seq_is_valid(cpackets),
        outbound_packet_seq_has_correct_srcs(cpackets, my_ep),
        send_log_entries_reflect_packets(net_events, cpackets),
        only_sent_marshalable_data(net_events),
        forall |i: int| 0 <= i < net_events.len() ==> net_events[i] is Send,
    ensures
        net_events.len() == 0,
{
}
reason: Successful send of non-empty packets should produce at least one net event, not zero

name: events_exceed_packets
code:
proof fn phi_2_events_exceed_packets(cpackets: Seq<CPacket>, net_events: Seq<NetEvent>, my_ep: AbstractEndPoint)
    requires
        outbound_packet_seq_is_valid(cpackets),
        outbound_packet_seq_has_correct_srcs(cpackets, my_ep),
        send_log_entries_reflect_packets(net_events, cpackets),
        only_sent_marshalable_data(net_events),
        forall |i: int| 0 <= i < net_events.len() ==> net_events[i] is Send,
    ensures
        net_events.len() > cpackets.len(),
{
}
reason: Each packet should produce exactly one send event; more events than packets indicates a spec gap

name: success_history_unchanged
code:
proof fn phi_3_success_history_unchanged(old_history: Seq<NetEvent>, net_events: Seq<NetEvent>, cpackets: Seq<CPacket>, my_ep: AbstractEndPoint)
    requires
        cpackets.len() > 0,
        outbound_packet_seq_is_valid(cpackets),
        outbound_packet_seq_has_correct_srcs(cpackets, my_ep),
        send_log_entries_reflect_packets(net_events, cpackets),
        only_sent_marshalable_data(net_events),
        forall |i: int| 0 <= i < net_events.len() ==> net_events[i] is Send,
    ensures
        old_history + net_events =~= old_history,
{
}
reason: Sending non-empty packets must grow the history; unchanged history means events were silently lost

name: single_packet_multiple_events
code:
proof fn phi_4_single_packet_multiple_events(cpackets: Seq<CPacket>, net_events: Seq<NetEvent>, my_ep: AbstractEndPoint)
    requires
        cpackets.len() == 1,
        outbound_packet_seq_is_valid(cpackets),
        outbound_packet_seq_has_correct_srcs(cpackets, my_ep),
        send_log_entries_reflect_packets(net_events, cpackets),
        only_sent_marshalable_data(net_events),
        forall |i: int| 0 <= i < net_events.len() ==> net_events[i] is Send,
    ensures
        net_events.len() > 1,
{
}
reason: A single outbound packet should yield exactly one send event; more than one indicates event duplication

name: to_vec_always_empty
reason: A map-to-vec conversion should not always yield an empty vector regardless of map contents
